description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to specific branches and tags, on pull requests, on workflow dispatch, and on a daily schedule. The workflow has a concurrency policy that cancels in-progress jobs. It defines four jobs: core, test, docs, and extras, each using a reusable tox workflow with different configurations and dependencies. The test, docs, and extras jobs depend on the core or test job and use Codecov tokens from secrets.
